  • Marketplace
  • ECUs

Combined_DCDC_OBC_AC3_V2.0

OBD Information

Protocol: CAN
Send ID: 18DADDF1
Recv ID: 18DAF1DD
Baudrate: 10400
Func Addr: DD
Func Name: Superviseur-DCDC_29b

Auto IDents

[
  {
    "diagversion": "17",
    "supplier": "EVTECH",
    "soft": "B200",
    "version": "OBCDCDC3.00"
  }
]

Devices

[
  {
    "dtc": 6816,
    "dtctype": 0,
    "devicedata": {},
    "name": "DCDC_HV Voltage/Current"
  },
